function: Examples for Writing to a File
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_file (column1 UInt32, column2 Nullable(UInt32), column3 Float32) ENGINE = Memory;

INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION file('test_{_partition_id}.tsv', 'TSV', 'column1 UInt32, column2 Nullable(UInt32), column3 Float32') PARTITION BY column3 VALUES (1, 2, 3.5), (2, NULL, 4.0), (3, 2, 5.5), (4, 3, NULL);
SELECT column1, column2 FROM test_file WHERE column2 != 2 ORDER BY column1;
SELECT *, (column1 != column2) AS isNotEqual FROM (SELECT column1, column2 FROM test_file) WHERE isNotEqual = 1;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, value, CAST(value AS Float32) AS float_value FROM complex_test HAVING float_value != 3.5;
INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION file('filter_test.tsv', 'TSV', 'id UInt32, value String') SELECT id, value FROM complex_test WHERE id != 3;
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM complex_test GROUP BY id HAVING sumIf(CAST(value AS Float32), id != 2) != 4) AS filtered;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value, CAST(value AS Nullable(Float32)) AS float_val FROM complex_test) WHERE float_val != float_val;
